query: SELECT CASE WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%drive.google%' THEN 'Google Drive' WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%cloudfront%' THEN 'CloudFront/S3' WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%googleapis%' THEN 'Google API' ELSE 'Other' END as storage_type, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(createdAt) as earliest, MAX(createdAt) as latest FROM intakeFileAttachments GROUP BY storage_type;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT CASE WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%drive.google%' THEN 'Google Drive' WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%cloudfront%' THEN 'CloudFront/S3' WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%googleapis%' THEN 'Google API' ELSE 'Other' END as storage_type, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(createdAt) as earliest, MAX(createdAt) as latest FROM intakeFileAttachments GROUP BY storage_type;
